original_statement: how long did it take for alejandro valverde to finish?
mutated_statement: how long did it take for someone to do something?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Action generalization: Specific person "alejandro valverde" replaced by generic agent "someone" (alejandro valverde→someone) | Specific action "finish" replaced by vague placeholder "do something" (finish→do something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought可识别的关键信息：系统直接说明“表格列出了比赛结果……只有第1名的完整时间是5h 29' 10"，因此耗时为5h29'10"，匹配预测答案”。Agent的具体表现是直接依据表中第1名的时间给出明确数值答案，未在任何位置指出变异问题存在泛化或不明确之处，也未请求澄清或提出假设。因为没有表现出对“someone/do something”这类泛化问题的任何不确定性意识（没有使用ambiguous/unclear/无法确定等表述），且直接按照自身理解完成任务，故归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
